checks.result: Canonical operational SQLite was read through URI mode=ro, backed up online, restored only to isolated targets, and source file/directory state remained unchanged.
Static public build, 23 browser checks, screenshot, DOM, AX, trace and distribution scans expose no application runtime, Context or private values.
Alpha is only the read-only pfi_context.v1 consumer and is absent from PFI primary navigation; Ralpha and Serenity-Alipay active dependency counts are zero.
